channel.title: Chroniq Now: Breaking Global News and Headlines Daily
channel.description: Chroniq Now - your trusted source for breaking global news, in-depth analysis and up-to-the-minute coverage of politics, business, culture and more.

item.title: Neymar's Brazil World Cup hopes hit after poor Santos display
item.description:
Neymar's World Cup hopes with Brazil face uncertainty after a quiet performance for Santos against Corinthians ahead of Carlo Ancelotti naming his squad

Key points:
• Santos and Corinthians drew 1-1 at Vila Belmiro on Sunday, with Memphis Depay opening the scoring and Gabigol equalising for the hosts
• Neymar, returning after a two-week absence, had a subdued display — managing just two shots and playing a minor role in the buildup to Santos' goal
• The match was Neymar's final chance to impress before Carlo Ancelotti names his Brazil squad on Monday for friendlies against France and Croatia
• Neymar had already damaged his case by missing the previous Santos match against Mirassol — a game Ancelotti attended specifically to evaluate him

Read the full article: Neymar's Brazil World Cup hopes hit after poor Santos display

item.title: Driven Advisors Scrutinized: Bancrédito Holding Dispute
item.description:
Driven Advisors & Administrative Services face scrutiny in a legal dispute with Bancrédito...
